title: Add edge case tests — empty path, special chars, concurrent writes
description: PRD §4 requires edge case tests covering: empty path handling across all backends (should throw IOError/NotFoundError), special characters in filenames (spaces, unicode, dots, slashes), and concurrent write safety (two simultaneous sets to the same path). Create test/edge-cases.test.js with these scenarios validated across all 5 backends. Target: PRD gap 'Edge case tests (empty path, special chars, concurrent writes)'.
